title: Cataclysmic Tree
description: Catacylsmic Tree is modified on original Arcwise - Puffish Skill Tree mod and is made for the Catacylsmic Modpack by request of Akio.
body:
Catacylsmic Tree is modified on original Arcwise - Puffish Skill Tree mod and is made for the Catacylsmic Modpack by request of Akio.

Creators and Owners
- JosipFX
- Akio, (Discord: akiospidertss, Modrinth: TheShatteringSpider, Creator of Catacylsmic Modpack)

Changes made:

# Combat

- Reorganized the category overall.
- Added more Mobs to Experience Sources.
- Added more bow Skills

![Combat](https://i.postimg.cc/rFBcK81q/2026-03-17-21-49-38.png)

# Tools (Woodworking, Mining, Excavation)

- Combined: Woodworking, Mining, Excavation into 1 category "Tools"
- Reorganized the category overall.
- The skills are now unlocked progressively 0 -> 35

![Tools](https://i.postimg.cc/L4rQKhkz/2026-03-17-21-49-42.png)

# Dexterity

- New category, focuses on Breaking speed (by hand) and Fortune
- The skills are now unlocked progresivelly 0 -> 75

![Dexterity](https://i.postimg.cc/RCfQtdfJ/2026-03-17-21-49-46.png)

**Custom backgrounds and other categories that were not listed here were performed by other mods and not this one.**
